namespace ch04

open Nat

lemma lemma‚āĀ {p : ‚Ąē} [h : Fact p.Prime] :
    let num_solutions := Finset.card { s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = - 1 }
    (‚ąÉ m, p = 4 * m + 1 ‚Üí num_solutions = 2) ‚ąß
    (p = 2 ‚Üí num_solutions = 1) ‚ąß
    (‚ąÉ m, p = 4 * m + 1 ‚Üí num_solutions = 0) := by
  constructor
  ¬∑ sorry
  ¬∑ constructor
    ¬∑ intro hp
      -- TODO: figure out how to easily write `use 1` here to follow more closely the book
      aesop
    ¬∑ sorry

-- TODO: golf, and perhaps make it even close to book proof
lemma lemma‚āā (n m : ‚Ąē) (hn : n = 4 * m + 3) :
  ¬¨ ‚ąÉ a b, n = a ^2 + b ^2 := by
  push_neg
  intro a b
  by_contra h
  have : (n : ZMod 4) =  a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 := by
    rw [h]
    simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow]
  rw [hn] at this
  simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat] at this
  rw [mul_eq_zero_of_left (by rfl) (m : ZMod 4), zero_add] at this
  have hx : ‚ąÄ (x : ZMod 4),  x ^2 ‚ąą ({0, 1} : Finset (ZMod 4)) := by
    intro x
    fin_cases x <;> simp
    ¬∑ exact Or.inl rfl
    ¬∑ exact Or.inr rfl
  have ha := hx <| a
  have hb := hx  <| b
  generalize hA: (a : ZMod 4) ^ 2 = A
  generalize hB: (b : ZMod 4) ^ 2 = B
  rw [hA, hB] at this
  rw [hA] at ha
  rw [hB] at hb
  fin_cases A <;> fin_cases B <;> norm_num at this <;> tauto

-- We follow a similar path taken by Jeremy Tan and Thomas Browning in
-- mathlib4/Archive/ZagierTwoSquares.lean.

theorem theorem‚āĀ  {p : ‚Ąē} [h : Fact p.Prime] (hp : p % 4 = 1) : ‚ąÉ a b : ‚Ąē, a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p := by
  sorry

section Sets

open Set

variable (k : ‚Ąē) [hk : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime]

/-- We study the set S -/
def S : Set (‚Ą§ √ó ‚Ą§ √ó ‚Ą§) := {((x, y, z) : ‚Ą§ √ó ‚Ą§ √ó ‚Ą§) | 4 * x * y + z ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 ‚ąß x > 0 ‚ąß y > 0}

omit hk in
lemma S_lower_bound {x y z : ‚Ą§} (h : ‚ü®x, y, z‚ü© ‚ąą S k) : 0 < x ‚ąß 0 < y  := ‚ü®h.2.1, h.2.2‚ü©

omit hk in
lemma S_upper_bound {x y z : ‚Ą§} (h : ‚ü®x, y, z‚ü© ‚ąą S k) :
    x ‚Č§ k ‚ąß y ‚Č§ k := by
  obtain ‚ü®_, _‚ü© := S_lower_bound k h
  simp [S, mem_setOf_eq] at h
  refine ‚ü®?_, ?_‚ü©
  all_goals try nlinarith

-- todo use Fin 2 instead of ({(0 : ‚Ą§), 1})
/-- Embedding of the set `S` into a finite product of finite sets for `Fintype` instance. -/
def embed_S : S k ‚Üí Ioc (0 : ‚Ą§) k √óňĘ Ioc (0 : ‚Ą§) k √óňĘ ({(0 : ‚Ą§), 1}) :=
  fun  (‚ü®‚ü®x, y, z‚ü©, h‚ü© : S k) ‚Ü¶ by
  have lb := S_lower_bound k h
  have ub := S_upper_bound k h
  exact ‚ü®‚ü®x, y, if 0 ‚Č§ z then 1 else 0‚ü©, ‚ü®‚ü®lb.1, ub.1‚ü©, ‚ü®lb.2, ub.2‚ü©, by
    simp; exact
    Int.lt_or_le z 0 ‚ü©‚ü©

omit hk in
lemma embed_S_injective : Function.Injective (embed_S k):= by
  intro s1 s2 hS
  simp [embed_S] at hS
  ext
  ¬∑ exact hS.1
  ¬∑ exact hS.2.1
  ¬∑ have := hS.2.2
    have ‚ü®‚ü®x1, y1, z1‚ü©, ‚ü®h1, _, _‚ü©‚ü© := s1
    have ‚ü®‚ü®x2, y2, z2‚ü©, ‚ü®h2, _, _‚ü©‚ü© := s2
    have hz_eq_z: z1 ^ 2 = z2 ^ 2 := by
      nlinarith
    simp at this
    by_cases hz1 : 0 ‚Č§ z1
    ¬∑ simp [hz1] at this
      by_cases hz2 : 0 ‚Č§ z2
      ¬∑ nlinarith
      ¬∑ simp [hz2] at this
    ¬∑ by_cases hz2 : 0 ‚Č§ z2
      ¬∑ simp [hz2] at this
        tauto
      ¬∑ nlinarith

noncomputable instance : Fintype (S k) := by
  refine' Fintype.ofInjective (embed_S k) (embed_S_injective k)

end Sets

section Involutions

open Function

variable (k : ‚Ąē)

/- 1. -/

/-- The linear involution `(x, y, z) ‚Ü¶ (y, x, -z)`. -/
def linearInvo : Function.End (S k) := fun ‚ü®‚ü®x, y, z‚ü©, h‚ü© => ‚ü®‚ü®y, x, -z‚ü©, by
  simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h ‚äĘ
  exact ‚ü®by linarith [h], h.2.2, h.2.1‚ü© ‚ü©

theorem linearInvo_sq : linearInvo k ^2  = (1 : Function.End (S k)) := by
  change linearInvo k ‚ąė linearInvo k = id
  funext x
  simp [linearInvo]

theorem linearInvo_no_fixedPoints : IsEmpty (fixedPoints (linearInvo k)) := by
  simp only [isEmpty_subtype, mem_fixedPoints, Subtype.forall, Prod.forall]
  intro x y z h hfixed
  simp only [IsFixedPt, linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at hfixed
  have : z = 0 := by linarith
  obtain ‚ü®h, _, _‚ü© := h
  simp only [this, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, zero_pow, add_zero] at h
  apply_fun (¬∑ % 4) at h
  simp [mul_assoc, Int.add_emod] at h

/-- The subset of `S k` where `z` is positive. -/
def T : Set (S k) := {‚ü®(_, _, z), _‚ü© : S k |  z > 0}

lemma lemma‚āĀ {p : ‚Ąē} [h : Fact p.Prime] :
    let num_solutions := Finset.card { s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = - 1 }
    (‚ąÉ m, p = 4 * m + 1 ‚Üí num_solutions = 2) ‚ąß
    (p = 2 ‚Üí num_solutions = 1) ‚ąß
    (‚ąÉ m, p = 4 * m + 1 ‚Üí num_solutions = 0) := by

-- TODO: golf, and perhaps make it even close to book proof
lemma lemma‚āā (n m : ‚Ąē) (hn : n = 4 * m + 3) :
  ¬¨ ‚ąÉ a b, n = a ^2 + b ^2 := by
  push_neg
  intro a b
  by_contra h

    rw [h]
    simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow]
  rw [hn] at this
  simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat] at this
  rw [mul_eq_zero_of_left (by rfl) (m : ZMod 4), zero_add] at this
  have hx : ‚ąÄ (x : ZMod 4),  x ^2 ‚ąą ({0, 1} : Finset (ZMod 4)) := by
    intro x
    fin_cases x <;> simp
    ¬∑ exact Or.inl rfl
    ¬∑ exact Or.inr rfl
  have ha := hx <| a
  have hb := hx  <| b
  generalize hA: (a : ZMod 4) ^ 2 = A
  generalize hB: (b : ZMod 4) ^ 2 = B
  rw [hA, hB] at this
  rw [hA] at ha
  rw [hB] at hb
  fin_cases A <;> fin_cases B <;> norm_num at this <;> tauto

/-- Embedding of the set `S k` into a finite product of finite sets for `Fintype` instance. -/
def embed_S : S k ‚Üí Ioc (0 : ‚Ą§) k √óňĘ Ioc (0 : ‚Ą§) k √óňĘ ({(0 : ‚Ą§), 1}) :=
  fun  (‚ü®‚ü®x, y, z‚ü©, h‚ü© : S k) ‚Ü¶ by
  have lb := S_lower_bound k h
  have ub := S_upper_bound k h
  exact ‚ü®‚ü®x, y, if 0 ‚Č§ z then 1 else 0‚ü©, ‚ü®‚ü®lb.1, ub.1‚ü©, ‚ü®lb.2, ub.2‚ü©, by
    simp; exact
    Int.lt_or_le z 0 ‚ü©‚ü©

omit hk in
lemma embed_S_injective : Function.Injective (embed_S k):= by
  intro s1 s2 hS
  simp [embed_S] at hS
  ext
  ¬∑ exact hS.1
  ¬∑ exact hS.2.1
  ¬∑ have := hS.2.2
    have ‚ü®‚ü®x1, y1, z1‚ü©, ‚ü®h1, _, _‚ü©‚ü© := s1
    have ‚ü®‚ü®x2, y2, z2‚ü©, ‚ü®h2, _, _‚ü©‚ü© := s2
    have hz_eq_z: z1 ^ 2 = z2 ^ 2 := by
      nlinarith
    simp at this
    by_cases hz1 : 0 ‚Č§ z1
    ¬∑ simp [hz1] at this
      by_cases hz2 : 0 ‚Č§ z2
      ¬∑ nlinarith
      ¬∑ simp [hz2] at this
    ¬∑ by_cases hz2 : 0 ‚Č§ z2
      ¬∑ simp [hz2] at this
        tauto
      ¬∑ nlinarith

noncomputable instance : Fintype (S k) := by
  refine' Fintype.ofInjective (embed_S k) (embed_S_injective k)

end Sets

  rw [hA, hB] at this
